targets.rawSql: SELECT state, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM production_order WHERE received_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY state ORDER BY state

SELECT received_at, order_id, order_type, workpiece_id, state FROM production_order WHERE state IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'RUNNING', 'ENQUEUED') AND received_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT date_trunc('minute', stopped_at) AS time, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM production_order WHERE stopped_at IS NOT NULL AND stopped_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
